cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out what time the Ecoworld Discovery Centre closes on a Monday in April. Let me read through the information given again to make sure I don't miss anything. The opening times are divided into two periods: April 1st to September 30th, and October 1st to March 31st. Since the question is about April, we're looking at the first period. For April to September, the opening hours are: - Monday-Friday: 10 am to 6 pm - Weekends: 10 am to 7 pm So, April is within the April 1st to September 30th timeframe. The question is specifically about a Monday in April, which would fall under the "Monday-Friday" schedule. According to the given times, Monday-Friday closes at 6 pm.
